{{Quote|With the increased threat of regional and isolated attacks by parties dissatisfied with the company's role in Republic affairs, the Curovao family decided to err on the side of caution and station armed sentries at the entrances to all our corporate facilities. The safety of our employees and clients remains our primary concern.|Aladaire Curovao-Simo|<ref name="Galactic Campaign Guide">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>}}
'''Aladaire Curovao-Simo''' was the family spokesperson for the [[Curovao family]] and its business, [[Curovao ImpEx]].
